notes: Word count 710 exceeds 300-500 guide but depth justifies it (original excess-death calculation, intl context, vehicle age mechanism, counterargument, actionable advice)

last_completed.headline: Honda Built the Safest SUVs in America. Then Forgot to Rustproof Them.
